envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Recommendations are PROPOSED_NOT_APPROVED. Neutral compliance vocabulary per ADR-0070. Risk Map regions block downstream activation.

items.name: Risk Map Recommendation
items.description: Ranks proposed Risk Map regions (Map-blocking risks / unknown areas / compliance-sensitive surfaces / high-risk tools+workflows / RULE-20-protected forbidden inferences).
items.human_readable_summary: Proposes which risks admins should encode. Map-blocking risks gate downstream activation. Unknown areas default to BLOCKED_BY_POLICY.
items.model_usage_notes: Map-blocking risks rank highest because they prevent downstream activation. Unknown areas default to BLOCKED_BY_POLICY until reviewed. RULE-20-protected forbidden inferences are absolute regardless of plan tier.

ranked_regions.rationale_summary: Map-blocking risks must be encoded before any downstream Map region activates.
Forbidden inferences (workforce scoring / managerial-oversight monitoring / sensitive-attribute / personality-trait) absolute regardless of plan tier.
Conservative default: treat unknown areas as forbidden until reviewed.
GDPR / HIPAA / FERPA / SOX / regional law surfaces require LawfulBasis per ADR-0036 at regulator-view tier.
Legal-effect / money-moving / customer-PII risks require dual-control per ADR-0026.

items.rationale: Risk Map ranks first across the system because its regions block downstream Map activation. Unknown areas default to BLOCKED_BY_POLICY. RULE-20-protected forbidden inferences absolute.
cross_map_dependencies: Risk Map gates Company Map activation (compliance surfaces)
Risk Map gates Tool Map activation (high-risk tools excluded)
Risk Map gates Workflow Map activation (high-risk workflows blocked)
Risk Map gates Memory / DMW Map activation (forbidden categories)
Risk Map gates Authority Map activation (excluded relationships)
items.approval_gate_required: Admin policy approval at D4 + neutral compliance vocabulary per ADR-0070.
DMW_scope_implications: Risk Map gates which DMW scopes may activate downstream
Map-blocking risks exclude their domains from any DMW scope
Compliance-sensitive surfaces require LawfulBasis per ADR-0036 at regulator-view DMW scope
Unknown areas default to forbidden-DMW until reviewed
governance_review_points: Admin must approve every Risk Map region before downstream maps activate
Map-blocking risks gate Tool / Workflow / Connector / Memory Map activation
Neutral compliance vocabulary mandatory per ADR-0070
No claims of regulator approval, no claims of guaranteed compliance
RULE-20-protected forbidden inferences absolute regardless of plan tier
safe_defaults: Conservative default for unknown areas (treat as forbidden until reviewed)
audit_expectations: future BREAK_GLASS_* + LawfulBasis per ADR-0050 + ADR-0036
